findings.finding: test_integration_stage3_round_2_with_carryover_escalate is named _escalate but its own inline rationale concludes 'action=retry still since cap_hit is False' for the stated inputs (iteration=3, max_iterations=3). The test name and asserted value are contradicted by the description text. An implementer reading this entry cannot determine which action to assert.
findings.suggested_fix: Change the _escalate test to use iteration=4, max_iterations=3 — which actually produces action='escalate' under the adopted > semantic. The current iteration=3,max=3 case belongs in a boundary test named _retry_at_cap_boundary asserting action='retry'. This resolves the name/description/assertion contradiction without altering any architectural decision.
findings.notes: The round-2 fix split the single ambiguous test into two entries as required, but then introduced a new internal contradiction in the _escalate entry. The core ambiguity migrated from 'retry or escalate' phrasing into a test whose name says escalate but body says retry.

findings.finding: Phase 2 test list still contains no test explicitly naming code-reviewer or red-team-reviewer as role inputs. Hyphenated path construction in load_stage3_round_jsons remains untested at the plan level.
findings.suggested_fix: Add test_load_stage3_round_jsons_hyphenated_roles with round-1-code-reviewer.json and round-1-red-team-reviewer.json as expected_roles. EC9 in tester_edge_cases.json provides a concrete stub.
findings.notes: Explicitly deferred to implementation in round-2-fixes.md. Not a plan-level blocker per the fix author's judgment, but the gap remains. Flagging for record-keeping; not driving this iteration's verdict alone.

findings.finding: TDD plan table row for Phase 3 still reads 'evaluate_stage5_dual single-shot semantics; deprecation warning'. Five of the six stale locations were fixed; this one was missed. The plan elsewhere specifies ImportError (removal), not DeprecationWarning.
findings.suggested_fix: Update README.md line 508 Phase 3 table cell to: 'evaluate_stage5_dual single-shot semantics; ImportError on import of removed function'.
